description: T04 verify guidance — what agents should paste into T05 (Round 2 dogfood G-59).

M02-auth-worker-routes.why: AUTH-RT-001 and AUTH-RT-002 are separate patterns — register-only snippets fail login (AUTH-RT-002).

M05-auth-session-middleware.why: Worker CORS preflight + origin-locked cookie satisfy AUTH-MW patterns (not only Next middleware).

M12-stripe-webhook.why: STWH-002/003 idempotency and lifecycle signals live in the webhook handler, not the crypto helper alone.

M04-auth-ui-routes.why: Include register/sign-in HTML with links to /legal#terms-of-service and /legal#privacy-policy.

M11-stripe-checkout-route.why: Paste the checkout session creation route handler, not only Stripe client init.
